title: Garcinia tsimatimia

This family is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions around the world. Garcinia tsimatimia is a species of flowering plant in the genus Garcinia, which consists of tropical trees and shrubs native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. The genus Garcinia is part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as the angiosperms.
